Home.introText: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Home.graphicDesignDescription: Visual identities, editorial design, and graphic projects.
Home.blogDescription: Updates, reflections and thoughts on projects.
Home.contactDescription: For collaborations, commissions or questions, fill in the form: I'll reply by email.

ContactForm.successMessage: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon.

errors.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.
errors.serviceUnconfigured: Email service is not configured. Try again later or contact me through another channel.
errors.sendFailed: Sending failed. Please try again in a few minutes.

Photography.pageDescription: Galleries hosted on Cloudinary. Optional: an image whose name (last segment of the public id) is
Photography.cloudinaryNotConfigured: Cloudinary not configured: set CLOUDINARY_* in .env.local.
Photography.emptyFolder: Empty folder on Cloudinary or wrong `folder` path in the manifest.
Photography.loadError: Unable to load the gallery from Cloudinary.
Photography.addGalleries: Add entries to src/data/photography-galleries.js (slug, title, description, Cloudinary folder). Set CLOUDINARY_* for build and deploy.
Photography.errorCloudinaryNotConfiguredBody: Set CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_API_KEY and CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET in .env.local.
Photography.errorEmptyFolderBody: There are no images in this Cloudinary folder, or the `folder` value in the manifest does not match the actual path.
Photography.errorGalleryUnavailableBody: Could not read images from Cloudinary. Check folder and API permissions.
Photography.errorNoImagesBody: The folder only contains a cover image and no other photos, or the folder has no displayable images.

Video.pageDescription: List in src/data/videos.js: slug, title, short description, vimeoId (digits only), optional thumbnailUrl for the card.
Video.addVideos: Add entries to src/data/videos.js (slug, title, description, Vimeo id).
Video.errorInvalidIdBody: The vimeoId field in the manifest must contain digits only. Fix src/data/videos.js and redeploy.

Blog.description: Updates and thoughts — add posts in src/content/blog/en/.
Blog.createPost: Create a .md file in src/content/blog/en/ to publish your first post.

RevalidateCache.title: Regenerate gallery cache
RevalidateCache.description: After modifying images or folders on Cloudinary, submit the form to clear the server cache and regenerate static pages. You need the revalidation secret configured in your environment variables.
RevalidateCache.successMessage: Cache updated. You can return to the galleries.
